title: ehretia cumanensis
intro: Ehretia cumanensis, also known as the Cuban ehretia or the Panama rosewood, is a tropical tree species native to Central America and the Caribbean. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, including its extracts and essential oils, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Ehretia cumanensis include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against oxidative stress. Ehretia cumanensis is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
